{"files": [{"path": "requirements.txt", "content": "fastapi uvicorn jinja2 python-multipart"}, {"path": "main.py", "content": "from fastapi import FastAPI, Request, Form from fastapi.templating import Jinja2Templates from fastapi.responses import HTMLResponse, RedirectResponse import uuid app = FastAPI() templates = Jinja2Templates(directory='templates') db = { 'users': [ {'id': '1', 'name': 'Ali Hassan', 'email': 'ali@email.com', 'password': 'pass123', 'role': 'student'}, ], 'courses': [ {'id': '1', 'title': 'Spanish for Beginners', 'category': 'Spanish', 'duration': '8 weeks', 'teacher_name': 'Maria Lopez', 'level': 'Beginner', 'lessons_count': 24, 'enrolled': True}, {'id': '2', 'title': 'French Intermediate', 'category': 'French', 'duration': '10 weeks', 'teacher_name': 'Jean Dupont', 'level': 'Intermediate', 'lessons_count': 30, 'enrolled': False}, {'id': '3', 'title': 'Mandarin Basics', 'category': 'Mandarin', 'duration': '12 weeks', 'teacher_name': 'Li Wei', 'level': 'Beginner', 'lessons_count': 36, 'enrolled': False}, {'id': '4', 'title': 'German Conversational', 'category': 'German', 'duration': '6 weeks', 'teacher_name': 'Hans Muller', 'level': 'Intermediate', 'lessons_count': 18, 'enrolled': True}, {'id': '5', 'title': 'Japanese Writing & Reading', 'category': 'Japanese', 'duration': '14 weeks', 'teacher_name': 'Yuki Tanaka', 'level': 'Advanced', 'lessons_count': 42, 'enrolled': False}, {'id': '6', 'title': 'Arabic for Beginners', 'category': 'Arabic', 'duration': '8 weeks', 'teacher_name': 'Omar Khalid', 'level': 'Beginner', 'lessons_count': 24, 'enrolled': False}, ], 'lessons': [ {'id': '1', 'course_id': '1', 'title': 'Greetings & Introductions', 'video_url': 'https://example.com/video1', 'duration': '12 min', 'completed': True}, {'id': '2', 'course_id': '1', 'title': 'Numbers and Counting', 'video_url': 'https://example.com/video2', 'duration': '15 min', 'completed': True}, {'id': '3', 'course_id': '1', 'title': 'Colors and Objects', 'video_url': 'https://example.com/video3', 'duration': '18 min', 'completed': False}, {'id': '4', 'course_id': '1', 'title': 'Days and Time', 'video_url': 'https://example.com/video4', 'duration': '20 min', 'completed': False}, {'id': '5', 'course_id': '4', 'title': 'Basic Phrases', 'video_url': 'https://example.com/video5', 'duration': '10 min', 'completed': True}, {'id': '6', 'course_id': '4', 'title': 'Asking Directions', 'video_url': 'https://example.com/video6', 'duration': '14 min', 'completed': False}, ], 'exercises': [ {'id': '1', 'lesson_id': '1', 'question': 'How do you say "Hello" in Spanish?', 'options': ['Hola', 'Bonjour', 'Ciao', 'Hallo'], 'answer': 0, 'user_id': None, 'is_correct': None}, {'id': '2', 'lesson_id': '1', 'question': 'What does "Gracias" mean?', 'options': ['Please', 'Sorry', 'Thank you', 'Goodbye'], 'answer': 2, 'user_id': None, 'is_correct': None}, {'id': '3', 'lesson_id': '2', 'question': 'What is "Dos" in English?', 'options': ['One', 'Two', 'Three', 'Four'], 'answer': 1, 'user_id': None, 'is_correct': None}, {'id': '4', 'lesson_id': '3', 'question': 'How do you say "Red" in Spanish?', 'options': ['Azul', 'Verde', 'Rojo', 'Amarillo'], 'answer': 2, 'user_id': None, 'is_correct': None}, ], 'submissions': [], 'dashboard': { 'user_id': '1', 'total_completed_exercises': 12, 'average_completion_time': 18, 'recommended_course_id': '2', 'streak_days': 7, 'total_lessons_watched': 8, 'xp_points': 340 } } @app.get('/', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def home(request: Request): featured = db['courses'][:3] return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='home.html', context={'featured': featured} ) @app.get('/courses', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def courses(request: Request, category: str = '', level: str = ''): results = db['courses'] if category: results = [c for c in results if c['category'] == category] if level: results = [c for c in results if c['level'] == level] categories = sorted(set(c['category'] for c in db['courses'])) levels = sorted(set(c['level'] for c in db['courses'])) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='courses.html', context={'courses': results, 'categories': categories, 'levels': levels, 'sel_category': category, 'sel_level': level} ) @app.get('/lessons', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def lessons(request: Request, course_id: str = '1'): course = next((c for c in db['courses'] if c['id'] == course_id), db['courses'][0]) course_lessons = [l for l in db['lessons'] if l['course_id'] == course_id] completed = sum(1 for l in course_lessons if l['completed']) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='lessons.html', context={'lessons': course_lessons, 'course': course, 'completed': completed, 'total': len(course_lessons), 'courses': db['courses']} ) @app.get('/exercises', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def exercises(request: Request, lesson_id: str = '1'): lesson = next((l for l in db['lessons'] if l['id'] == lesson_id), db['lessons'][0]) lesson_exercises = [e for e in db['exercises'] if e['lesson_id'] == lesson_id] completed = sum(1 for s in db['submissions'] if s['lesson_id'] == lesson_id) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='exercises.html', context={'exercises': lesson_exercises, 'lesson': lesson, 'lessons': db['lessons'], 'completed': completed} ) @app.post('/api/exercises') async def submit_exercises(request: Request, lesson_id: str = Form(...)): form = await request.form() exercises = [e for e in db['exercises'] if e['lesson_id'] == lesson_id] correct = 0 for ex in exercises: ans = form.get(f'answer_{ex["id"]}') is_correct = ans is not None and int(ans) == ex['answer'] if is_correct: correct += 1 db['submissions'].append({ 'id': str(uuid.uuid4())[:5], 'lesson_id': lesson_id, 'exercise_id': ex['id'], 'is_correct': is_correct }) db['dashboard']['total_completed_exercises'] += len(exercises) db['dashboard']['xp_points'] += correct * 10 return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='exercises.html', context={'exercises': exercises, 'lesson': next((l for l in db['lessons'] if l['id'] == lesson_id), {}), 'lessons': db['lessons'], 'completed': len(exercises), 'result': True, 'correct': correct, 'total': len(exercises)} ) @app.get('/dashboard', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def dashboard(request: Request): rec = next((c for c in db['courses'] if c['id'] == db['dashboard']['recommended_course_id']), None) enrolled = [c for c in db['courses'] if c['enrolled']] return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='dashboard.html', context={'dash': db['dashboard'], 'recommended': rec, 'enrolled': enrolled} ) @app.get('/api/courses') async def api_courses(): return {'courses': db['courses']} @app.get('/api/lessons') async def api_lessons(course_id: str = ''): lessons = [l for l in db['lessons'] if l['course_id'] == course_id] if course_id else db['lessons'] return {'lessons': lessons} @app.get('/api/dashboard') async def api_dashboard(): return {'dashboard': db['dashboard']} "}, {"path": "templates/base.html", "content": " LinguaLearn | Language Learning Platform
LinguaLearn
Courses Lessons Exercises Dashboard
My Dashboard
{% block content %}{% endblock %}
© 2026 LinguaLearn. Master a New Language Every Day.

{"files": [{"path": "requirements.txt", "content": "fastapi uvicorn jinja2 python-multipart"}, {"path": "main.py", "content": "from fastapi import FastAPI, Request, Form from fastapi.templating import Jinja2Templates from fastapi.responses import HTMLResponse app = FastAPI() templates = Jinja2Templates(directory='templates') db = { 'courses': [ {'id': '1', 'course_name': 'Introduction to AI', 'department': 'Computer Science', 'semester': 'Spring 2026', 'enrolled': 120, 'avg_attendance': 87.4, 'avg_midterm': 72.1, 'avg_final': 78.5}, {'id': '2', 'course_name': 'Data Structures', 'department': 'Computer Science', 'semester': 'Spring 2026', 'enrolled': 95, 'avg_attendance': 91.2, 'avg_midterm': 68.3, 'avg_final': 74.0}, {'id': '3', 'course_name': 'Calculus II', 'department': 'Mathematics', 'semester': 'Spring 2026', 'enrolled': 140, 'avg_attendance': 83.6, 'avg_midterm': 61.8, 'avg_final': 65.4}, {'id': '4', 'course_name': 'Digital Marketing', 'department': 'Business', 'semester': 'Fall 2025', 'enrolled': 80, 'avg_attendance': 94.1, 'avg_midterm': 81.2, 'avg_final': 85.7}, {'id': '5', 'course_name': 'Thermodynamics', 'department': 'Engineering', 'semester': 'Fall 2025', 'enrolled': 65, 'avg_attendance': 79.8, 'avg_midterm': 58.6, 'avg_final': 62.9}, {'id': '6', 'course_name': 'Psychology 101', 'department': 'Social Sciences', 'semester': 'Spring 2026', 'enrolled': 200, 'avg_attendance': 88.5, 'avg_midterm': 76.4, 'avg_final': 80.1}, ], 'student_performance': [ {'id': '1', 'course_id': '1', 'student_id': 'S001', 'student_name': 'Ali Hassan', 'attendance_rate': 92.0, 'midterm_score': 78, 'final_score': 82}, {'id': '2', 'course_id': '1', 'student_id': 'S002', 'student_name': 'Fatima Khan', 'attendance_rate': 88.0, 'midterm_score': 85, 'final_score': 90}, {'id': '3', 'course_id': '2', 'student_id': 'S001', 'student_name': 'Ali Hassan', 'attendance_rate': 95.0, 'midterm_score': 70, 'final_score': 75}, {'id': '4', 'course_id': '3', 'student_id': 'S003', 'student_name': 'Sara Malik', 'attendance_rate': 76.0, 'midterm_score': 55, 'final_score': 61}, ], 'reports': [ {'id': '1', 'title': 'Spring 2026 Semester Report', 'description': 'Full academic performance summary for all courses in Spring 2026.', 'download_link': '#', 'created_at': '2026-04-01', 'type': 'Semester'}, {'id': '2', 'title': 'CS Department Analytics', 'description': 'Detailed metrics and trend analysis for the Computer Science department.', 'download_link': '#', 'created_at': '2026-03-15', 'type': 'Department'}, {'id': '3', 'title': 'Attendance vs Grade Correlation', 'description': 'Statistical analysis of how attendance rates correlate with final grades.', 'download_link': '#', 'created_at': '2026-03-20', 'type': 'Research'}, {'id': '4', 'title': 'Fall 2025 Final Summary', 'description': 'Comprehensive performance breakdown for Fall 2025 semester.', 'download_link': '#', 'created_at': '2026-01-10', 'type': 'Semester'}, ] } @app.get('/', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def dashboard(request: Request): total_enrolled = sum(c['enrolled'] for c in db['courses']) avg_attendance = round(sum(c['avg_attendance'] for c in db['courses']) / len(db['courses']), 1) avg_final = round(sum(c['avg_final'] for c in db['courses']) / len(db['courses']), 1) top_course = max(db['courses'], key=lambda x: x['avg_final']) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='dashboard.html', context={'courses': db['courses'][:4], 'total_enrolled': total_enrolled, 'avg_attendance': avg_attendance, 'avg_final': avg_final, 'top_course': top_course} ) @app.get('/courses', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def courses(request: Request, semester: str = '', department: str = ''): results = db['courses'] if semester: results = [c for c in results if c['semester'] == semester] if department: results = [c for c in results if c['department'] == department] semesters = sorted(set(c['semester'] for c in db['courses']), reverse=True) departments = sorted(set(c['department'] for c in db['courses'])) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='courses.html', context={'courses': results, 'semesters': semesters, 'departments': departments, 'sel_semester': semester, 'sel_department': department} ) @app.get('/reports', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def reports(request: Request): return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='reports.html', context={'reports': db['reports']} ) @app.get('/api/courses') async def api_courses(): return {'courses': db['courses']} @app.get('/api/student-performance') async def api_performance(): return {'performance': db['student_performance']} @app.get('/api/reports') async def api_reports(): return {'reports': db['reports']} "}, {"path": "templates/base.html", "content": " EduMetrics | Learning Analytics Dashboard
EduMetrics
Dashboard Courses Reports
Download Reports
{% block content %}{% endblock %}
© 2026 EduMetrics. Learning Analytics for Educational Institutions.
"}, {"path": "templates/dashboard.html", "content": "{% extends 'base.html' %} {% block content %}

{% endblock %}"}, {"path": "templates/reports.html", "content": "{% extends 'base.html' %} {% block content %}

{"files": [{"path": "requirements.txt", "content": "fastapi uvicorn jinja2 python-multipart"}, {"path": "main.py", "content": "from fastapi import FastAPI, Request, Form from fastapi.templating import Jinja2Templates from fastapi.responses import HTMLResponse, RedirectResponse import uuid from datetime import datetime app = FastAPI() templates = Jinja2Templates(directory='templates') db = { 'weekly_plans': [ {'id': '1', 'week_number': 15, 'created_at': '2026-04-07'}, {'id': '2', 'week_number': 14, 'created_at': '2026-03-31'}, ], 'meals_of_day': [ {'id': '1', 'plan_id': '1', 'day_of_week': 'Monday', 'meal_name': 'Oatmeal with Berries', 'meal_type': 'Breakfast', 'calories': 320}, {'id': '2', 'plan_id': '1', 'day_of_week': 'Monday', 'meal_name': 'Grilled Chicken Salad', 'meal_type': 'Lunch', 'calories': 480}, {'id': '3', 'plan_id': '1', 'day_of_week': 'Monday', 'meal_name': 'Salmon with Quinoa', 'meal_type': 'Dinner', 'calories': 620}, {'id': '4', 'plan_id': '1', 'day_of_week': 'Tuesday', 'meal_name': 'Greek Yogurt & Honey', 'meal_type': 'Breakfast', 'calories': 280}, {'id': '5', 'plan_id': '1', 'day_of_week': 'Tuesday', 'meal_name': 'Lentil Soup', 'meal_type': 'Lunch', 'calories': 390}, {'id': '6', 'plan_id': '1', 'day_of_week': 'Tuesday', 'meal_name': 'Pasta Primavera', 'meal_type': 'Dinner', 'calories': 540}, {'id': '7', 'plan_id': '1', 'day_of_week': 'Wednesday', 'meal_name': 'Avocado Toast', 'meal_type': 'Breakfast', 'calories': 350}, {'id': '8', 'plan_id': '1', 'day_of_week': 'Wednesday', 'meal_name': 'Turkey Wrap', 'meal_type': 'Lunch', 'calories': 420}, ], 'shopping_list_items': [ {'id': '1', 'plan_id': '1', 'item_name': 'Chicken Breast', 'quantity': 500, 'unit': 'g', 'category': 'Protein', 'checked': False}, {'id': '2', 'plan_id': '1', 'item_name': 'Salmon Fillet', 'quantity': 300, 'unit': 'g', 'category': 'Protein', 'checked': False}, {'id': '3', 'plan_id': '1', 'item_name': 'Quinoa', 'quantity': 200, 'unit': 'g', 'category': 'Grains', 'checked': True}, {'id': '4', 'plan_id': '1', 'item_name': 'Mixed Berries', 'quantity': 250, 'unit': 'g', 'category': 'Fruits', 'checked': False}, {'id': '5', 'plan_id': '1', 'item_name': 'Greek Yogurt', 'quantity': 500, 'unit': 'ml', 'category': 'Dairy', 'checked': True}, {'id': '6', 'plan_id': '1', 'item_name': 'Avocado', 'quantity': 3, 'unit': 'pcs', 'category': 'Fruits', 'checked': False}, {'id': '7', 'plan_id': '1', 'item_name': 'Whole Wheat Bread', 'quantity': 1, 'unit': 'loaf', 'category': 'Grains', 'checked': False}, {'id': '8', 'plan_id': '1', 'item_name': 'Spinach', 'quantity': 200, 'unit': 'g', 'category': 'Vegetables', 'checked': False}, ], 'nutrition_tracker_entries': [ {'id': '1', 'plan_id': '1', 'date': '2026-04-07', 'protein': 95, 'carbs': 220, 'fats': 55, 'calories': 1780}, {'id': '2', 'plan_id': '1', 'date': '2026-04-08', 'protein': 88, 'carbs': 195, 'fats': 48, 'calories': 1620}, {'id': '3', 'plan_id': '1', 'date': '2026-04-09', 'protein': 102, 'carbs': 230, 'fats': 60, 'calories': 1840}, {'id': '4', 'plan_id': '1', 'date': '2026-04-10', 'protein': 78, 'carbs': 210, 'fats': 52, 'calories': 1710}, ], 'recipes': [ {'id': '1', 'title': 'Grilled Chicken Salad', 'category': 'Salad', 'prep_time': 20, 'servings': 2, 'calories': 480, 'tags': 'High Protein, Low Carb'}, {'id': '2', 'title': 'Salmon with Quinoa', 'category': 'Main Course', 'prep_time': 30, 'servings': 2, 'calories': 620, 'tags': 'Omega-3, Gluten Free'}, {'id': '3', 'title': 'Oatmeal with Berries', 'category': 'Breakfast', 'prep_time': 10, 'servings': 1, 'calories': 320, 'tags': 'High Fiber, Vegan'}, {'id': '4', 'title': 'Lentil Soup', 'category': 'Soup', 'prep_time': 40, 'servings': 4, 'calories': 390, 'tags': 'Vegan, High Fiber'}, {'id': '5', 'title': 'Avocado Toast', 'category': 'Breakfast', 'prep_time': 5, 'servings': 1, 'calories': 350, 'tags': 'Healthy Fats, Quick'}, {'id': '6', 'title': 'Pasta Primavera', 'category': 'Pasta', 'prep_time': 25, 'servings': 3, 'calories': 540, 'tags': 'Vegetarian, Italian'}, ] } @app.get('/', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def home(request: Request): featured = db['recipes'][:3] return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='home.html', context={'featured': featured} ) @app.get('/weekly-planner', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def weekly_planner(request: Request, plan_id: str = '1'): plan = next((p for p in db['weekly_plans'] if p['id'] == plan_id), db['weekly_plans'][0]) meals = [m for m in db['meals_of_day'] if m['plan_id'] == plan_id] days = ['Monday', 'Tuesday', 'Wednesday', 'Thursday', 'Friday', 'Saturday', 'Sunday'] total_calories = sum(m['calories'] for m in meals) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='weekly_planner.html', context={'plan': plan, 'meals': meals, 'days': days, 'plans': db['weekly_plans'], 'total_calories': total_calories} ) @app.get('/shopping-list', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def shopping_list(request: Request, category: str = ''): items = db['shopping_list_items'] if category: items = [i for i in items if i['category'] == category] categories = sorted(set(i['category'] for i in db['shopping_list_items'])) checked = sum(1 for i in db['shopping_list_items'] if i['checked']) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='shopping_list.html', context={'items': items, 'categories': categories, 'sel_category': category, 'checked': checked, 'total': len(db['shopping_list_items'])} ) @app.get('/nutrition-tracker', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def nutrition_tracker(request: Request): entries = db['nutrition_tracker_entries'] avg_protein = round(sum(e['protein'] for e in entries) / len(entries), 1) if entries else 0 avg_carbs = round(sum(e['carbs'] for e in entries) / len(entries), 1) if entries else 0 avg_fats = round(sum(e['fats'] for e in entries) / len(entries), 1) if entries else 0 avg_calories = round(sum(e['calories'] for e in entries) / len(entries)) if entries else 0 return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='nutrition_tracker.html', context={'entries': entries, 'avg_protein': avg_protein, 'avg_carbs': avg_carbs, 'avg_fats': avg_fats, 'avg_calories': avg_calories} ) @app.get('/recipe-suggestions', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def recipe_suggestions(request: Request, q: str = '', category: str = ''): results = db['recipes'] if q: results = [r for r in results if q.lower() in r['title'].lower() or q.lower() in r['tags'].lower()] if category: results = [r for r in results if r['category'] == category] categories = sorted(set(r['category'] for r in db['recipes'])) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='recipe_suggestions.html', context={'recipes': results, 'categories': categories, 'q': q, 'sel_category': category} ) @app.post('/api/weekly-planner') async def api_create_plan(data: dict): return {'status': 'created', 'plan_id': str(uuid.uuid4())[:5]} @app.get('/api/weekly-planner/{week_id}') async def api_get_plan(week_id: str): meals = [m for m in db['meals_of_day'] if m['plan_id'] == week_id] return {'plan_id': week_id, 'meals': meals} @app.post('/api/shopping-list') async def api_shopping_list(data: dict): return {'status': 'generated', 'items_count': len(db['shopping_list_items'])} @app.get('/api/nutrition-tracker') async def api_nutrition(): return {'entries': db['nutrition_tracker_entries']} @app.post('/api/recipe-suggestions') async def api_recipes(data: dict): q = data.get('query', '').lower() results = [r for r in db['recipes'] if q in r['title'].lower()] if q else db['recipes'] return {'recipes': results} "}, {"path": {"files": [{"path": "requirements.txt", "content": "fastapi uvicorn jinja2 python-multipart"}, {"path": "main.py", "content": "from fastapi import FastAPI, Request, Form from fastapi.templating import Jinja2Templates from fastapi.responses import HTMLResponse, RedirectResponse import uuid from datetime import datetime app = FastAPI() templates = Jinja2Templates(directory='templates') db = { 'journals': [ {'id': '1', 'user_id': '1', 'entry_date': '2026-04-10', 'mood': 'Happy', 'mood_score': 4, 'content': 'Had a great productive day. Finished all my tasks and went for a walk in the evening.'}, {'id': '2', 'user_id': '1', 'entry_date': '2026-04-09', 'mood': 'Anxious', 'mood_score': 2, 'content': 'Feeling a bit overwhelmed with deadlines. Tried breathing exercises which helped a little.'}, {'id': '3', 'user_id': '1', 'entry_date': '2026-04-08', 'mood': 'Calm', 'mood_score': 3, 'content': 'Spent some time reading and had a quiet evening. Feeling balanced overall.'}, {'id': '4', 'user_id': '1', 'entry_date': '2026-04-07', 'mood': 'Sad', 'mood_score': 1, 'content': 'Difficult day. Missing family. Reached out to a friend which helped.'}, ], 'resources': [ {'id': '1', 'category': 'Anxiety', 'title': 'Understanding Anxiety Disorders', 'link': '#', 'description': 'A comprehensive guide to recognizing and managing anxiety in everyday life.'}, {'id': '2', 'category': 'Depression', 'title': 'Coping with Depression', 'link': '#', 'description': 'Evidence-based strategies and self-care tips for managing depression.'}, {'id': '3', 'category': 'Mindfulness', 'title': '10-Minute Mindfulness Practice', 'link': '#', 'description': 'A beginner-friendly daily mindfulness routine for stress reduction.'}, {'id': '4', 'category': 'Sleep', 'title': 'Sleep Hygiene Guide', 'link': '#', 'description': 'Practical tips to improve sleep quality and establish healthy nighttime habits.'}, {'id': '5', 'category': 'Anxiety', 'title': 'Breathing Techniques for Panic Attacks', 'link': '#', 'description': 'Step-by-step breathing exercises to manage acute anxiety episodes.'}, {'id': '6', 'category': 'Mindfulness', 'title': 'Body Scan Meditation', 'link': '#', 'description': 'A guided body scan meditation to release tension and improve awareness.'}, ], 'counselors': [ {'id': '1', 'name': 'Dr. Amina Farooq', 'specialty': 'Anxiety & Stress', 'available': True, 'rating': 4.9, 'sessions': 320, 'next_slot': '2026-04-14 10:00'}, {'id': '2', 'name': 'Dr. Usman Khalid', 'specialty': 'Depression & Grief', 'available': True, 'rating': 4.7, 'sessions': 210, 'next_slot': '2026-04-15 14:00'}, {'id': '3', 'name': 'Ms. Sana Riaz', 'specialty': 'Mindfulness & CBT', 'available': False, 'rating': 4.8, 'sessions': 175, 'next_slot': '2026-04-17 11:00'}, ], 'sessions': [ {'id': 'SES001', 'user_id': '1', 'counselor_id': '1', 'counselor_name': 'Dr. Amina Farooq', 'session_date': '2026-04-14 10:00', 'status': 'Upcoming'}, ] } MOOD_MAP = {'Happy': 4, 'Calm': 3, 'Anxious': 2, 'Sad': 1} @app.get('/', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def home(request: Request): return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='home.html', context={} ) @app.get('/journal', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def journal(request: Request): return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='journal.html', context={'entries': db['journals'], 'success': False} ) @app.post('/journal') async def create_journal(mood: str = Form(...), content: str = Form(...)): db['journals'].insert(0, { 'id': str(uuid.uuid4())[:5], 'user_id': '1', 'entry_date': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d'), 'mood': mood, 'mood_score': MOOD_MAP.get(mood, 3), 'content': content }) return RedirectResponse(url='/journal', status_code=303) @app.get('/resources', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def resources(request: Request, category: str = ''): results = db['resources'] if category: results = [r for r in results if r['category'] == category] categories = sorted(set(r['category'] for r in db['resources'])) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='resources.html', context={'resources': results, 'categories': categories, 'sel_category': category} ) @app.get('/sessions', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def sessions(request: Request): return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='sessions.html', context={'counselors': db['counselors'], 'sessions': db['sessions'], 'success': False} ) @app.post('/api/sessions') async def book_session(counselor_id: str = Form(...)): counselor = next((c for c in db['counselors'] if c['id'] == counselor_id), None) if counselor: db['sessions'].append({ 'id': 'SES' + str(uuid.uuid4())[:4].upper(), 'user_id': '1', 'counselor_id': counselor_id, 'counselor_name': counselor['name'], 'session_date': counselor['next_slot'], 'status': 'Upcoming' }) return RedirectResponse(url='/sessions', status_code=303) @app.post('/api/journals') async def api_create_journal(data: dict): return {'status': 'created'} @app.get('/api/resources') async def api_resources(): return {'resources': db['resources']} @app.post('/api/sessions') async def api_book_session(data: dict): return {'status': 'booked', 'session_id': 'SES' + str(uuid.uuid4())[:5]} "},
